{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Heliogoth IX
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Heliogoth IX]] is a planet with a government.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
